candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label; preferred revenue line and populated across years.
Also a valid top-line revenue label with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Not revenue; direct cost line.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of revenues / COGS line; best match for direct production/service costs.
Could be a direct cost component, but there are duplicated Project costs rows and an explicit COGS total exists, so the explicit COGS label is preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS row rather than Project costs because Project costs appears twice and may be a component or duplicated detail.

candidates.why: Clear overhead/operating expense component consistent with SG&A.
Semantically SG&A, but preview is empty and may be unused or supplemental.
Could be a small operating overhead component, but too narrow and preview is empty.
Would be an SG&A component if populated, but preview is empty.
Balance-sheet liability, not an income-statement SG&A expense row.

variables.notes: Candidate list missed the important overhead row 'Staff costs', which is a core SG&A/personnel expense. Chose it from the full A-column labels together with candidate 'Other external expenses' to capture operating overhead. Did not use subtotal 'Reported Operating Expense' and did not include depreciation/amortization rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff costs
No dedicated research and development expense line is present on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Most semantically precise interest-expense label, though preview is empty; keep as top-priority fallback if populated in some years.

Populated finance-cost line; best available non-missing broad finance expense if specific interest expense is unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list favors specific interest-expense labels first, then broader finance expense if that is all that is reported.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; use for book equity when no parent-only equity line is present.
Could include minority interest and therefore risks double counting if MIB were also used.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate owner/parent equity line is shown, so using Total Equity. Per rule, MIB is set to [] to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Income-statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Total including equity and minority interest, not the standalone minority-interest line required for MIB.

variables.notes: No standalone balance-sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest amount is reported. 'Minority Int.' is present but unpopulated in the preview, and 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals 'Total Equity', indicating no separate MIB to add.
